message:
test(trace): Expand distributed tracing context, ID, and span tests

Context (163 lines added):
- trace_flags_individual_bits_are_independent: SAMPLED, DEBUG, NONE
- trace_flags_byte_roundtrip: all byte values roundtrip through TraceFlags
- child_context_inherits_trace_id_and_flags: child inherits trace_id,
  flags, origin_region, and baggage from parent
- child_context_has_unique_span_id_and_correct_parent: child span_id
  differs from parent, parent_span_id matches parent's span_id
- serialization_roundtrip_empty_baggage: full to_bytes/from_bytes
  roundtrip with no baggage items
- serialization_roundtrip_multiple_baggage_items: roundtrip with 3
  baggage entries preserves all key-value pairs

ID (101 lines added):
- Tests for TraceId and SpanId construction, comparison, display

Span (172 lines added):
- Tests for SymbolSpanId lifecycle, parent/child relationships, timing

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
